code-graph-page.description: Full codebase dependency graph visualization with file nodes, import edges, search/filter, tabbed view

file-viewer-panel.description: Read-only file content viewer using CodeMirror, shown when a graph node is clicked

code-graph-api.description: Backend API providing codebase dependency graph data

file-content-api.description: Backend API providing file content for click-to-view

cytoscape-cleanup.description: Cytoscape instance must be destroyed in useEffect cleanup; use cy.batch() for bulk updates

progressive-loading.description: Graphs with 200+ nodes must render directory-level clusters first; show warning at renderable limit

keyboard-accessible.description: Graph nodes navigable via keyboard; selected node details announced via aria-live

definition.scope: Overhaul Knowledge Graph page into full Code Graph visualization with file dependency viewing, click-to-view source, search/filter, tabbed Code Graph / Set DAG view.

tasks.description: Create useCodeGraph hook for /code-graph endpoint with 30s+ polling
tasks.acceptance: Hook fetches graph data with loading/error states

tasks.description: Rename KnowledgeGraphPage to CodeGraphPage, update all references
Implement tabbed view for Code Graph and Set DAG
tasks.acceptance: Both tabs render; existing DAG preserved

tasks.description: Build code graph visualization with Cytoscape.js force-directed layout
tasks.acceptance: File nodes colored by language, import edges with arrows

tasks.description: Implement click-to-view file panel with CodeMirror
tasks.acceptance: Clicking node opens syntax-highlighted file viewer

tasks.description: Add search/filter for filename filtering with graph highlighting
tasks.acceptance: Typing highlights matching nodes, dims others

tasks.description: Add performance safeguards: directory clustering, max-nodes warning

acceptance: Code Graph page renders codebase dependency graph
Click-to-view opens file content in CodeMirror panel
Search filters graph nodes by filename
Tab switching works without page reload
Cytoscape instance properly cleaned up on unmount
